name: Concurrent Execution using Shared Resource with Improper Synchronization ('Race Condition')
description: The product contains code sequences that can run concurrently and access a shared resource without proper synchronization, creating a race condition where the timing of operations can lead to data corruption, privilege escalation, or denial of service.
detection_pattern: Multiple TRANSFORM or CONTROL nodes access the same STORAGE[shared_resource] node across concurrent execution paths without a CONTROL[synchronization] node (mutex, lock, atomic operation, transaction) mediating exclusive access between the read and write operations
